LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. CROSS DEFENDANT THOMAS WARD'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. CROSS-COMPLAINANT FLIESLER MEYER LLP HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO ALLEGE EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. EACH CAUSE OF ACTION IS NOT CLEARLY AND AFFIRMATIVELY BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BASED ON THE ALLEGED PERIOD OF MISCONDUCT FROM 2005 TO 2012. FOR THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION, CROSS-COMPLAINANT ALLEGES CONVERSION OF FIRM PROPERTY AND MONEY. (CROSS-COMPLAINT, 70.) A GENERAL DEMURRER DOES NOT LIE TO ONLY PART OF A CAUSE OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

ATTY. CORENA G. LARIMER & ATTY. MICHAEL C. ZELLER OF TUCKER ELLIS LLP, TEL. NO. 617-2110 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF THOMAS WARD's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted. None of the claims are clearly and affirmatively barred by the statutes of limitations and sufficient facts have been pled to support a theory of alter ego liability for Meyer IP Law Group. DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-31-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - THOMAS A. WARD, TEL. NO. (925) 377-7819, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. CORENA G. LARIMER OF TUCKER ELLIS LLP, TEL. NO. 617-2110 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT THOMAS WARD'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is Overruled. Cross-Complainant Fliesler Meyer LLP has pled sufficient facts to allege each cause of action. Each cause of action is not clearly and affirmatively barred by the statute of limitations based on the alleged period of misconduct from 2005 to 2012. For the sixth cause of action, Cross-Complainant alleges conversion of firm property and money. (Cross-Complaint, 70.) A general demurrer does not lie to only part of a cause of action. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
